detaileddescription.para: Clear all entries (but keep bucket array).

parameterdescription.para: If true, free all value pointers

simplesect.para: Newly allocated hash table, or NULL on error

parameterdescription.para: If true, free the value pointer

simplesect.para: 0 if found and deleted, -1 if not found

parameterdescription.para: If true, also free all value pointers

detaileddescription.para: Get all keys as an array.

parameterdescription.para: Output array for keys (must be pre-allocated)

simplesect.para: Value pointer, or NULL if not found
